text: The last time I went to a park was actually a...
couple of weeks ago. My friends and I decided
to play soccer to keep fit and enjoy the bright sun.
which enabled us to appreciate the scenery.
To better the park near my house, I would advise...
the local government to set up more public for some time.
facilities, such as basketball courts or tennis courts.
for residents to spend their leisure time.
It would also be beneficial to plant more flowers.
This will beautify the surrounding area.
and make the park more attractive.
